x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: HR cases frequently contain sensitive personal data. Proper confidentiality classification prevents Now Assist from surfacing sensitive HR information in AI summaries or search results accessible to unauthorized users.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure HR case confidentiality levels via the HRSD confidentiality configuration. Assign confidentiality to cases containing sensitive employee information. Now Assist respects case confidentiality when generating summaries and search results.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_87f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c6e
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[HR cases frequently contain sensitive personal data. Proper confidentiality classification prevents Now Assist from surfacing sensitive HR information in AI summaries or search results accessible to unauthorized users.]]></ai_justification><check_name>HR Case Confidentiality Classification</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var gr=new GlideRecord("sn_hr_core_case");
gr.addNotNullQuery("confidentiality");
gr.query();
var n=gr.getRowCount();
var gr2=new GlideRecord("sn_hr_core_case");
gr2.query();
var total=gr2.getRowCount();
var pct=total>0?Math.round((n/total)*100):0;
return{status:pct>=50?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:pct+"% of HR cases have confidentiality classification ("+n+" of "+total+")",finding:pct<50?"Only "+pct+"% of HR cases have confidentiality classification. Now Assist respects case confidentiality in AI summaries -- unclassified cases may expose sensitive HR data in AI outputs.":""+pct+"% of HR cases are confidentiality-classified -- Now Assist can apply appropriate data restrictions in AI outputs."};
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>HRSD</module><number>CHK0000411</number><order>190</order><remediation_guidance>Configure HR case confidentiality levels via the HRSD confidentiality configuration. Assign confidentiality to cases containing sensitive employee information. Now Assist respects case confidentiality when generating summaries and search results.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>87f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c6e</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>HR Case Confidentiality Classification</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_87f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c6e</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
